sections.name: Cut from the Air Leads To...

feat.name: Cut from the Air
feat.text: You can knock aside ranged attacks. You gain a +4 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack. If the attack misses, you knocked or cut it out of the air.

traits.name: Fighter
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the fighter class.

feat.trigger: You are the target of a physical ranged Strike
feat.requirement: You’re aware of the attack, not off-guard against it, and either have a hand free or are wielding a melee weapon
